body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Add heterotrophic respiration (soil CO2 efflux from microbial decomposition of soil organic matter) to our integrated model "soil_canopy_model.jl" - that we are using to do experiments with ozark. 

This model tracks soil CO2 concentration in the soil porous air space prognostically, as a result of co2 production by microbial decomposition of SOM and co2 diffusion through soil layers. co2 production and co2 diffusion are aux variables, varying with soil depth and time, both are function of soil temperature and moisture - and other variables.

title: Add heterotrophic respiration to integrated/soil_canopy_model.jl
